title: 3,000+ Tokens Per Second? Let's Stress Test Xiaomi's New Model: MiMo V2.5 Pro UltraSpeed
summary: Xiaomi and TileRT released MiMo V2.5 Pro UltraSpeed, a 1-trillion-parameter Mixture-of-Experts model achieving 3,000+ tokens per second on standard hardware. The architecture combines selective FP4 quantization, DFlash speculative decoding, and a persistent GPU kernel runtime to eliminate inference bottlenecks.
writeup: The video stress tests MiMo V2.5 Pro UltraSpeed, a 1-trillion-parameter Mixture-of-Experts model from Xiaomi and TileRT that reaches more than 3,000 tokens per second on standard hardware. It breaks down the three techniques behind that throughput: selective FP4 quantization, DFlash speculative decoding, and a persistent GPU kernel runtime, each aimed at removing inference bottlenecks. The takeaway is how these methods combine to push generation speed at trillion-parameter scale without specialized hardware.
